verified_controls: the sealed repair batch and every child PNG are rehashed before reuse
child encoded and decoded identities must match the resealed v2 target contract
the repair batch cannot claim hard-QC, strict-visual, operational, or autonomous-gold authority
a repaired target and every immutable protected sibling are rebuilt into one complete-map candidate batch
per-candidate author-provider and immutable lineage remain explicit in mixed-provider batches
the exact child target contract replaces only the repaired target while sibling target contracts remain unchanged
the rebuilt batch passes the ordinary non-overridable hard-QC entry point
the hard-QC report retains candidate-specific provider and repair lineage
fresh independent-family visual review receives the new exact target contract and complete evidence
a fresh visual pass still issues no operational certificate and creates no autonomous certified gold
